nasb.text: Was it not necessary for the Christ to suffer these things and to enter into His glory?”

esv.text: Was it not necessary that the Christ should suffer these things and enter into his glory?”

cnv.text: 基督這樣受害，然後進入他的榮耀，不是應當的嗎？”

ccb.text: 基督岂不是要先这样受害，然后进入祂的荣耀吗？”

csbs.text: 基督不是必须这样受难，然后才进入他的荣耀吗？”
